pi_items.source: Task specification: task.json description (line 5) requires creating role named 'map_editor', referenced in setup_task.sh (line 23 deletion check), export_result.sh (line 14 existence check), and verifier.py (line 62 scoring)

Task specification: task.json description (line 5) requires creating user 'editor1' with password 'Editor@2024!', referenced in setup_task.sh (line 21 deletion check), export_result.sh (line 21 existence check), and verifier.py (line 67 scoring)

Task specification: task.json description (line 5) states rule key should be 'ne.*.w' for workspace 'ne', all layers '*', write access 'w'. Format verified against GeoServer documentation (format: workspace.layer.access). Referenced in setup_task.sh (line 26), export_result.sh (line 57), and verifier.py (line 104)

Task specification: task.json description (line 5) specifies 'Granted roles: map_editor and ROLE_ADMINISTRATOR'. ROLE_ADMINISTRATOR is a built-in GeoServer system role (confirmed in GeoServer 2.25.x documentation). Referenced in export_result.sh (lines 60-61) and verifier.py (lines 91-99)
docker-compose.yml (line 25): kartoza/geoserver:2.25.2, install_geoserver.sh (line 53): docker pull kartoza/geoserver:2.25.2

task.json description (line 5) states credentials, docker-compose.yml (lines 32-33) sets environment variables, env.json (lines 45-46) user environment variables, setup_geoserver.sh (line 133) uses credentials, task_utils.sh (line 7) defines GS_AUTH
install_geoserver.sh lines 62-77: Downloads from NACIS CDN and Amazon S3, fallback mechanism for resilience
install_geoserver.sh lines 62-77: Downloads 1:110m scale shapefiles; setup_geoserver.sh lines 185-188: Publishes layers in 'ne' workspace via REST API
task.json description (line 5) specifies workspace 'ne', setup_geoserver.sh (lines 136, 185-188): Creates 'ne' workspace and publishes Natural Earth layers
task.json description (line 5) specifies password 'Editor@2024!' for editor1 user

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring GeoServer 2.25.2 (with admin credentials admin/Admin123!) to create a security role 'map_editor' and user 'editor1' with password 'Editor@2024!', then assign the user to the role and create a layer security access rule 'ne.*.w' granting write access to both the new 'map_editor' role and the built-in 'ROLE_ADMINISTRATOR' system role. The environment uses Natural Earth 1:110m public domain geospatial data (sourced from https://naciscdn.org/naturalearth/ and https://naturalearth.s3.amazonaws.com/) published in the 'ne' workspace via PostGIS 15 backend. All metadata claims are consistent with the task specification and refer to explicitly defined task requirements.
